data.title: Solana Mobile plans to introduce its SKR token in January, with a total supply of 10 billion tokens.
data.description: Solana Mobile has announced that the SKR token linked to its Seeker phone is scheduled to be released in the beginning of the upcoming year, with a circulating supply of 10 billion tokens.

data.title: Connecticut orders Kalshi, Robinhood, and Crypto.com to stop 'unlicensed' online gambling for breaching state laws.
data.description: State regulators in Connecticut have recently sent out cease-and-desist letters to platforms, accusing them of providing illegal sports-event contracts to users in the state. The letters were issued as a response to the platforms offering these contracts without proper authorization. The exact number of platforms involved and the extent of the illegal activity have not been disclosed publicly. The regulators are taking action to address the issue and prevent any further unlawful activities in the state.

data.title: X-Design's AI Agent democratizes branding for local businesses, reaching #1 on Product Hunt.
data.description: In Sydney on December 3, 2025, X-Design, an AI branding platform tailored for physical stores, revealed it has secured the top spot as the Product of the Day on Product Hunt. This achievement highlights the debut of its latest innovation, the AI Agent, which acts as an independent design collaborator.

data.title: Ultima Markets UK enters FMLS 2025, after securing FCA licence; shaping future for UK traders.
data.description: In London on December 4, 2025, Ultima Markets UK made a strong start at the Finance Magnates London Summit, displaying enthusiasm comparable to a sports team entering a new game. After obtaining its FCA license in August 2025, the firm arrived with vigor at FMLS 2025, preparing for upcoming opportunities.

data.title: Lantronix founder donates 3.0 million shares to TL Stiftung (TL Foundation), retains 2.3 million shares.
data.description: Lantronix Inc., a prominent provider of compute and connectivity IoT solutions for Edge AI applications, disclosed that its founder, Bernhard Bruscha, has given 3.0 million shares of Lantronix common stock from his personal holdings to the TL Stiftung (TL Foundation), a charitable organization in Germany. Consequently, Mr. Bruscha retains over 2.3 million shares in his personal holdings.

data.title: Bombardier accelerates construction on Abu Dhabi service center; executives from Abu Dhabi Airports involved.
data.description: Leadership members from Abu Dhabi Airports have partnered with executives from Bombardier at the site of the renowned Abu Dhabi service center.

data.title: Nona Biosciences appoints Dr. Hongjiang Miao as Chief AI Officer for AI-driven drug discovery.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on December 3, 2025, Nona Biosciences, a renowned biotechnology firm specializing in comprehensive solutions for biological drug innovation and advancement from Idea to IND, revealed the selection of Dr. Hongjiang Miao as their new Chief Executive Officer (CEO).
